Design Lab · Ari ↔ Ivan Dashboard

5 variants · Ari↔Ivan collaboration page (default view) · Solarized palette · dense wallboard

How to review: Scroll through each variant. Use the 💬 Add Feedback button (bottom-right) to click elements and leave comments. Fill in the overall direction, then copy and paste the feedback into the terminal.
A
Command CenterDense ops-room layout. KPI strips on top, story pipeline list + live feed in split pane. Dark throughout. Maximally dense — every row is data.
ARI ↔ IVAN

B
Story NarrativeStory-first hierarchy. Big hero statement → horizontal pipeline timeline → story cards grid. Balanced density. Good for external sharers who want to understand the loop quickly.
live · SciSummary

Ari captures demand. Ivan ships it.

14 stories closed this week · 87% loop closed · avg 2.4 days signal-to-PR

The Loop: customer signal → shipped release

23+4Tasks completed
5Active tasks
Active Stories
Churn Signal → Retention FeatureShipped

Customer patterns indicated rising cancellation intent in the free tier. Ari surfaced the signal; Ivan shipped a usage-summary email feature.

6/6 stagesRetention
started 6 days ago
API Latency Complaint → Caching LayerMerged

Repeated user feedback about slow API responses. Ari identified the pattern; Ivan implemented a Redis-backed cache.

5/6 stagesPerformance
started 4 days ago
Affiliate Confusion → Docs OverhaulIn Review

Support signals showed confusion around the affiliate program. Ari flagged it; Ivan rewrote the affiliate onboarding flow.

4/6 stagesGrowth
started 2 days ago
PDF Export Request → Feature ShipShipped

High-frequency feature request for PDF export of summaries. Ari quantified demand; Ivan shipped the export endpoint.

6/6 stagesProduct
started 12 days ago
Pricing Signal → Tier AdjustmentBuilding

Conversion signals indicated mid-tier pricing friction. Ari surfaced the gap; Ivan adjusted the billing flow.

2/6 stagesRevenue
started 1 day ago
Live Handoff Feed
